title: dryopteris tylodes
intro: Dryopteris tylodes, also known as the wood fern or autumn fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris tylodes include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
